name: LeaderLine.LeaderLineTypes
summary: The different types of leader lines available.

enum_values.name: Undefined
enum_values.summary: No type defined yet (this means that the leader line isn't selected yet).

enum_values.name: NormalLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: The standard leader line type. Its start point and elbow points can be freely modified. The end point is read-only information.

enum_values.name: SupportLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: The support leader line type, used in reinforcement marks with parallel leader lines. All leader line information is read-only.

enum_values.name: ExtensionLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: The type for the extension leader lines (enabled by the usage of an advanced option). All leader line information is read-only.
